explanations.3: This is a special formatting directive that makes the text bigger and changes its color to a light blue; the colons and curly braces tell the document processor (like Pandoc or Quarto) to apply these styling rules.
explanations.7: These curly braces with 'fragment' and 'fade-up' tell a presentation tool (like reveal.js) to make the image appear with a fade-up animation effect when you advance the slide.
